issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Self-host n8n with persistent PostgreSQL via Docker Compose
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented docker-compose with n8nio/n8n image, DB_TYPE=postgresdb env vars, n8n_data + pgdata volumes, and WEBHOOK_URL set; baseline produces a similar compose file but typically forgets WEBHOOK_URL and basic auth env names.

scenarios.name: Transform data inside an n8n Code node between webhook and Slack steps
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses $input.all() and returns items in the {json: {...}} shape n8n expects per the skill; baseline often returns a plain array or uses the wrong input accessor, which breaks downstream nodes.
